evals.prompt: We discussed a few ideas. Go ahead and change the 6 seed values to 6 named buckets.
evals.expected_output: Restates the literal change, flags any divergence from the broader discussion, then implements just the approved scope with tests.
expectations: Confirms the concrete, literal change before editing
Distinguishes the terse approval from the wider design discussion and does not silently expand scope
Reads the relevant files before editing and runs a verification step

evals.prompt: Commit and push first, then implement features 3 and 4. Also, what is telemetry here?
evals.expected_output: Answers the conceptual question, branches off main, commits a checkpoint, implements in tracked tasks, verifies end-to-end and confirms telemetry persisted.
expectations: Answers the conceptual question before coding
Branches off main and checkpoints before large edits
Breaks work into tracked tasks and verifies the result honestly
